title: Better Glass
body:
![BC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e8a7de04dd9c68745354cb5cda16adcdff23e22.png)



![Without](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5298695c0bb7994cf925e8f926c055d859756d1f.png)
                       
                                                Adds a clear connection between the glass
                           
![With](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96fbd405d0511fd26b28abe407f91ae03e87b452.png)

![FAA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e81b80ae53960c3f984090f7f60aded501ba5aa6.png)

Feature:


 - Adds a clear connection between the glass

 - Works with all colors of glass

 -        Glass Block
                All Stained Glass Blocks
                                Tinted Glass     
                                         And All The Glass Panes

――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――――

Have you ever used glass in construction and been annoyed by the questionable appearance of the glass joints? Now you can solve this by installing the Better Glass resource pack
